_aisle_canary.description: Simulates a file that reverted to an old git state (ghost reversion attack)
_aisle_canary.scenario: CC file cache resync bug: CC caches at Read time, resyncs after Bash, overwrites edits with stale cache

content: This file represents the OLD version of a hook that was reverted by the ghost reversion attack (anthropics/claude-code#42383). The current baseline should differ from this stale content.
